Title: Retro Sci-Fi Astronaut Girl Portrait Sticker
Description:
Celebrate a love for retro sci-fi aesthetics with this stylish astronaut portrait sticker. Featuring a captivating illustration of a young woman in a vintage-style space helmet, set against a cosmic background of twinkling stars and nebulas.

  • Perfect Aesthetic: Ideal for adding a nostalgic, cinematic, and futuristic touch to notebooks, laptops, water bottles, or planners.
  • High Quality Print: Professionally printed on durable sticker material designed to resist fading and peeling, keeping your décor looking fresh for years to come.
  • Unique Gift Idea: Makes a fantastic gift for space enthusiasts, anime fans, art collectors, or anyone who appreciates pop culture and retro design.

Whether you are planning a space journey or just decorating your daily essentials, this sticker adds a touch of timeless wonder and interstellar flair. Its simple, striking line art design ensures it complements any style, from academic to avant-garde.
